task_completion.description: Log into JFrog Artifactory as admin
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JFrog Artifactory web interface is visible in a browser, and the user profile or session indicates that the 'admin' user is logged in.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Security settings page
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Administration module is open, specifically showing the Security settings page where User Lockout policies can be configured.
The 'Enable User Lockout' checkbox or toggle is checked/enabled.

task_completion.description: Set the maximum failed login attempts to 3
task_completion.visual_evidence: The input field for 'Max Failed Login Attempts' (or similar) contains the value '3'.

task_completion.description: Set the lockout time to 1 hour
task_completion.visual_evidence: The input field for 'Lockout Time' (or similar) contains the value '1' (or '60' if the UI unit is in minutes), representing 1 hour.
A 'Save' button has been clicked, evidenced by a success toast notification (e.g., 'Settings successfully saved') or the settings persisting in a saved state.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser GUI to configure settings
integrity.visual_evidence: The configuration is done through the JFrog Artifactory web interface in a browser, not via terminal commands (like curl or API calls).

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Artifactory instance
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows http://localhost:8082, confirming interaction with the real application rather than a mock or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a script to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no visible terminal windows running scripts to automatically configure the security settings.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target configuration requires enabling user locking, setting max failed login attempts to 3, and setting the lockout time to 1 hour in JFrog Artifactory at http://localhost:8082 using the admin credentials (admin/password).
